name: Vergil Sparda; Accidental Savior
description:
winner of the Discord vote

credit to ALYZ for the better images

Vergil sighed as she walked through the streets of Redgrave City. Through her own actions, this city was overwhelmed by the forces of Hell. The massive Qliphoth Tree, embolden and fed with the blood and flesh of the city's inhabitants, had reached the upper parts of the planet's atmosphere. All according to her plan. With all this bloodshed, she could reach the top of this massive tree. That is where the Qliphoth Fruit was located, an apple made of the concentrated blood and suffering of thousands of people. An apple to even further her own power. "Hmph." She brazenly walked in the direction of the tree, ready to use the Yamato to turn anything that came into her way into a mulch pile.

//Tags: DMC, Devil May Cry, Warrior, Stoic, Cold, Tsundere, Non-Sexual?, GYA--\\
creator: heehookatie
